# Phil Reese, Arizona Business Broker

> Phil Reese is a Certified Business Intermediary (CBI) and Master CBI (MCBI) who has helped Arizona business owners confidentially buy and sell businesses since 2001. He works with West USA Realty, is five-star rated on Google, and is a former Ethics Chairman of the Arizona Business Brokers Association (AZBBA).

Phil provides free, confidential business valuations and represents both sellers and buyers across the Phoenix metro and the West Valley. He focuses on Main Street and lower-middle-market businesses, including restaurants and bars, medical and dental practices, assisted living and senior care, salons and med-spas, retail and franchises, home services and contractors, auto services, and light manufacturing. Every engagement is handled confidentially, so a sale stays private until the owner is ready.

## Core Services

- [For Sellers](https://www.philsellsbiz.com/business-sellers/): How to sell an Arizona business, the nine common mistakes to avoid, and Phil's confidential selling process.
- [For Buyers](https://www.philsellsbiz.com/business-buyers/): How buyers work with Phil to find and acquire the right Arizona business, including off-market opportunities.
- [Free Confidential Valuation (Contact)](https://www.philsellsbiz.com/contact/): Request a free, no-obligation valuation of your business.
- [What Is a CBI](https://www.philsellsbiz.com/what-is-a-cbi/): What a Certified Business Intermediary is and why the credential matters when selling a business.
- [Current Listings](https://www.philsellsbiz.com/listings/): Businesses currently for sale.

- [About Phil Reese](https://www.philsellsbiz.com/about/): Phil's background, including founding First Impression Security Doors in 1995 and earning the Master CBI credential.
